meaning: 亚喀巴[约旦西南部港市](临亚喀巴湾) ;亚喀巴湾(红海伸向东北方的海湾,在阿拉伯半岛和西奈半岛之间)
examples: The Gulf of Suez and the Gulf of Aqaba extend from the Red Sea toward the Mediterranean.
He spoke of an idea for a tourist town near the Tunisian border, a tax - and visa-free zone like those in Aqaba and Dubai.
Aqaba is in close proximity to the ancient city of Petra, recently designated as one of the new Seven Wonders of the World.
The Aqaba Special Economic Zone is a model for other parts of Jordan to follow.
The Turks expected an attack from British ships patrolling the waters of the Gulf of Aqaba to the west.
